Pricing.title: Choose your plan
Pricing.description: Publish your menu online and share it via QR code.

hero.title: Your menu online. In 5 minutes. No developer.
hero.subtitle: Build your digital menu, generate your QR code, update your dishes in a single click. Your guests scan, your sales grow.
hero.trust: No credit card · 5-minute setup · Cancel anytime

editor.title: Dead-simple editor
editor.description: Add, edit and reorder your dishes in a few clicks. No training required.

qr.title: Custom QR code
qr.description: Print your QR code, stick it on your tables, and you're live. Your guests scan, that's it.

stats.title: Real-time analytics
stats.description: See which dishes are hits, at what time, from which device. Make the right calls.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Try it free. Go Pro when you're ready to publish.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started

howItWorks.a: Create a free account, add your dishes, publish your menu and share it via a unique QR code to print on your tables.

techSkills.a: No. The interface is built for restaurant owners, not developers. Your menu is ready in minutes, without writing a single line of code.

commitment.a: No. The Pro plan is monthly and you can cancel anytime from your billing portal, in one click.

itemsLimit.q: How many dishes can I add?
itemsLimit.a: Unlimited, even on the free plan. Add as many starters, mains, desserts and drinks as you want.

watermark.q: Why a watermark on the free plan?
watermark.a: The free plan lets you create and preview your menu freely. To publish without the watermark and get your QR code, upgrade to Pro.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
